title: MGP Policy Context
description: Request-side policy and execution context for MGP operations.

task_id.description: Task identifier associated with the request.

session_id.description: Session identifier associated with the request.

task_type.description: Task classification associated with the request.

risk_level.description: Risk level associated with the requested operation.

requested_action.description: Operation category used for policy evaluation.

channel.description: Runtime channel or transport source for the request.

chat_id.description: Chat or conversation identifier associated with the request.

data_zone.description: Logical data zone or locality label.

correlation_id.description: External trace or correlation identifier carried across systems.

consent_basis.description: Why the caller is permitted to process or store this memory.

assertion_origin.description: High-level description of where the assertion originated.
